since_last: 54% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.50%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.21% · BTC +0.38% · Gold +0.33% · Nasdaq100 +0.49%. 54% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.50%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.50%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.50%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.50%, VRT +9.88%, SMR +9.86%, MRVL +9.25%, AMAT +7.47%. Laggards: SNAP -5.22%, META -4.26%, APP -4.11%, ADBE -3.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.37% at $199.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
